name: Backrooms Assault
description: Backrooms Assault is a shooter game where your mission is to survive the assault of hazmat soldiers and explore endless backrooms corridors to find the exit on each level and unlock new weapons.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot RMB - Aim Flashlight Space - Jump R - Reload G - Grenade F - Use C - Crouch
tags: 1 Player, 3D, 3D Games, Action, First Person Shooter, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Unity3D, WebGL
